parsed.production_notes: The video uses a split-screen format. The top half features an AI-generated avatar with unnatural, perfectly smooth movements and lip-syncing, set against an AI-generated background. The bottom half features a human actor recorded on camera.

characters.appearance: Female, young adult, slim build, medium complexion, dark hair tied back. Calm, professional, and slightly rigid facial features.
Female, young adult, medium build, dark complexion, long dark wavy hair, nose ring.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, initially anxious but becomes eager and happy.

scenes.setting: Top: futuristic office. Bottom: blurred warm indoor space.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is centered in the frame, facing forward. She wears a blue saree. The background is a high-tech office with blurred figures at computers and glowing blue screens. The lighting is cool and artificial. Her expression is neutral and professional.

Character B is centered in the frame, facing forward. She wears a light purple t-shirt and has a nose ring. The background is softly blurred with warm, yellowish-green tones. Her expression changes from concerned to happy as she speaks.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with Character A on top and Character B on the bottom. They appear to be having a video call conversation. Subtitles appear in the center of the screen throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: College-ல எல்லாரும் என்ன கலாய்க்கிறாங்க எனக்கு English தெரியலன்னு. எனக்கும் எல்லா cultural activities-லையும் participate பண்ணனும்னு ஆசையா தான் இருக்கு. ஆனா communicate பண்ணத் தெரியல. [Everyone in college makes fun of me because I don't know English. I also want to participate in all cultural activities. But I don't know how to communicate.]
Character A says: ஏன் கவலைப்படுறீங்க? நான் உங்களுக்கு English-அ தமிழ்லயே சொல்லித் தருவேன். Step-by-step-ஆ நான் உங்களுக்கு guide-ஆ இருப்பேன். நான் உங்க personal AI teacher. நீங்க தப்பா பேசினாலும் நான் தப்பா நினைக்க மாட்டேன். [Why are you worrying? I will teach you English in Tamil itself. I will be your guide step-by-step. I am your personal AI teacher. Even if you speak wrongly, I won't mistake you.]
Character B says: நிஜமாவா? [Really?]
Character A says: Okay அப்போ கவனிங்க. Tell me what many students want in this dance activity! அந்த sentence கொஞ்சம் தப்பு. இப்படி சொல்லிப் பாருங்க. Tell me, how many students want to participate in this dance activity. [Okay then listen. "Tell me what many students want in this dance activity!" That sentence is a bit wrong. Try saying it like this. "Tell me, how many students want to participate in this dance activity."]
Character B says: Wow! Super-ங்க... Thanks! [Wow! Super... Thanks!]
Character A says: Don't worry. English கத்துக்க நான் help பண்ணுவேன். Daily ஒரு 15 minutes மட்டும் இங்க practice பண்ணா போதும். English முன்னேறிடும். உங்க confidence-உம் mass-ஆ ஏறும். [Don't worry. I will help you learn English. Just practicing here for 15 minutes daily is enough. Your English will improve. Your confidence will also increase massively.]
Character B says: அப்படியா? இதுக்கு நான் நிறைய pay பண்ணனுமா என்ன? [Is it? Do I have to pay a lot for this?]
Character A says: No, கண்டிப்பா கிடையாது. வெறும் ₹29-ல 7 days-க்கு நீங்க start பண்ணலாம். அப்படின்னா ஒரு நாளைக்கு வெறும் ₹4 தான். இது ரொம்ப affordable. உங்க budget-க்கு ஏற்ற மாதிரி இந்த app use பண்ணிக்கலாம். [No, definitely not. You can start for 7 days at just ₹29. That means just ₹4 per day. This is very affordable. You can use this app according to your budget.]
Character B says: நிஜமாவா? செம்ம. அப்போ இப்போதிலிருந்தே நான் perfect-ஆ English கத்துக்க start பண்ணப் போறேன்! [Really? Awesome. Then I'm going to start learning English perfectly from now on!]

Super-ங்க... Thanks! Don't worry English கத்துக்க நான் help பண்ணுவேன் Daily ஒரு 15 minutes மட்டும் இங்க practice பண்ணா போதும் English முன்னேறிடும் உங்க confidence-உம் mass-ஆ ஏறும் அப்படியா? இதுக்கு நான் நிறைய pay பண்ணனுமா என்ன?
